title: 10 best herbal capsules for dizziness

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Maidenhair tree capsules helps with dizziness because they contain a unique combination of natural compounds that work together to stabilize blood pressure and improve circulation. The capsules' active ingredients, including calcium and magnesium, help to relax the blood vessels and reduce blood pressure fluctuations, which are often at the root of dizziness. Additionally, Maidenhair tree's adaptogenic properties allow it to help the body adapt to stress and promote balance, further reducing the likelihood of dizzy spells.
remedy_properties: Anti-Anxiety and Anti-Seizure Properties: Ginkgo biloba extracts have been shown to possess anti-anxiety and anti-seizure effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of dizziness and vertigo.

Improve Blood Flow and Oxygenation: The bioactive compounds in Ginkgo biloba capsules may help improve blood flow to the brain, reducing the likelihood of dizziness and lightheadedness by increasing oxygen delivery to the brain tissues.
Antioxidant Properties: Ginkgo biloba contains a range of antioxidants that can help protect against oxidative stress and inflammation, which may contribute to dizziness and other symptoms.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the maidenhair tree contain compounds that help to calm the nervous system, reducing symptoms of dizziness and vertigo.
Barks: The barks of the maidenhair tree have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues that can contribute to dizziness, as well as to support overall circulatory health.
remedy_recipe: Measure out one hundred grams of dried ginkgo biloba leaves and grind into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle.
Combine the ground powder with five hundred milliliters of 95% ethanol in a clean glass container, allowing it to steep for three hours.
Filter the mixture through a cheesecloth or coffee filter into another glass container, pressing on the solids to extract as much liquid as possible.
Evaporate the filtered liquid using a rotary evaporator or slow-drying process over low heat for two hours, resulting in a thick paste-like extract.
Encapsulate one teaspoon of the ginkgo biloba extract in vegetarian capsules and store them in an airtight container for up to six months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Cat's claw capsules helps with dizziness because they contain a unique blend of bioactive compounds that have been shown to have a positive effect on the body's balance and equilibrium. The antioxidants and anti-inflammatory properties in cat's claw help to soothe and calm the inner ear, reducing feelings of vertigo and lightheadedness. Additionally, the herb's natural sedative properties can also help to promote relaxation and reduce stress, which are often contributing factors to dizziness.
remedy_properties: Xanthones: These bioactive compounds have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce inflammation in the inner ear and balance system, thereby alleviating dizziness and vertigo symptoms.

Oxindole alkaloids: These compounds have antioxidant properties, which can help protect the inner ear from oxidative stress and damage, reducing the risk of dizziness and vertigo caused by free radical damage.

Triterpenes: These saponins have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce inflammation in the inner ear and balance system, while also protecting against oxidative stress and damage, leading to a reduction in dizziness and vertigo symptoms.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in alkaloids and glycosides, the roots help to stabilize blood pressure and reduce dizziness.
Rhyzomes: Containing a high concentration of antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, rhyzomes soothe the inner ear and alleviate dizziness.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality uncaria tomentosa roots and leaves in dry weather conditions.
Dry the harvested plant material using shade or low-temperature drying methods for several weeks.
Grind 250 grams of dried uncaria tomentosa root and leaf mixture into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix 30 grams of powdered cat's claw with 120 grams of tapioca starch in a bowl, then fill gelatin capsules with the mixture.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to six months or freeze for longer preservation.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Kava capsules helps with dizziness because they contain kavalactones, which are naturally occurring compounds that have a calming effect on the nervous system. These compounds help to reduce anxiety and stress, common triggers of dizziness. By promoting relaxation and reducing feelings of unease, kava capsules can alleviate dizziness caused by rapid heartbeat, vertigo, or motion sickness. Additionally, kavalactones may also improve circulation and reduce blood pressure, further contributing to their efficacy in combating dizziness.
remedy_properties: Kavalactones: These compounds have been shown to have anxiolytic (anxiety-reducing) effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of dizziness caused by anxiety or stress.
Lactones: Lactones in kava capsules have been found to have sedative properties, which can help calm the nervous system and reduce feelings of lightheadedness or dizziness.

Steroidal saponins: These compounds have been shown to have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of vertigo (a type of dizziness) caused by inflammation in the inner ear or balance system.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in kavalactones, the active compounds responsible for calming the nervous system and reducing dizziness.
Rhyzomes: The thickened underground stems of the kava plant contain a higher concentration of kavalactones than roots, making them a popular choice for medicinal capsules.
remedy_recipe: Source high-quality kava root extract piper methysticum from a reputable supplier.
Weigh 500mg of kava root extract and mix with 100mg of excipients such as rice flour or silicon dioxide.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the kava-root-extract mixture using a capsule filler machine.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container for at least 24 hours to allow flavors to mature.
Dispense one capsule orally twice daily as needed to alleviate dizziness and anxiety symptoms.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Valerian capsules helps with dizziness because they promote relaxation and calmness of the nervous system, reducing feelings of lightheadedness and vertigo. The herb's sedative properties help to soothe the mind and body, calming the brain's activity and promoting a sense of balance and stability. By regulating blood pressure and heart rate, valerian capsules also reduce the symptoms of dizziness, allowing individuals to regain their footing and feel more grounded.
remedy_properties: Sedative and anxiolytic effects: Valerian capsules help to calm the nervous system, reducing feelings of anxiety and tension that can contribute to dizziness.
Muscle relaxant properties: Valerian's ability to relax muscle tissue can help alleviate muscle spasms or cramps that may be causing or exacerbating dizziness.

Vasodilatory effects: Valerian has been shown to dilate blood vessels, which can help improve blood flow and oxygenation to the brain, reducing the severity of symptoms such as lightheadedness and vertigo.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the valerian plant are rich in essential oils and sesquiterpenes, which provide a calming effect and help alleviate symptoms of dizziness.
Rhyzomes: Valerian rhyzomes contain a high concentration of valerenic acid, which has been shown to have anti-anxiety properties and can help relieve feelings of dizziness.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh valeriana officinalis roots and wash them thoroughly under running water.
Dry the roots in a warm, well-ventilated area for at least 24 hours or until they become brittle.
Grind the dried roots into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for about 10 minutes.
Mix 1 part ground valerian root with 2 parts powdered gelatin and fill capsules with this mixture.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Maypop capsules helps with dizziness because they contain Passiflora incarnata, a natural herb that has been traditionally used to calm the nervous system and reduce feelings of vertigo. The capsules' active compounds, such as flavonoids and alkaloids, work together to promote relaxation and reduce anxiety, which are common underlying causes of dizziness. Additionally, Maypop's sedative properties help to stabilize blood pressure and circulation, further alleviating symptoms of dizziness. This natural remedy can provide a safe and effective way to find relief from dizzy spells.
remedy_properties: Vasodilation: Maypop capsules contain flavonoids that help dilate blood vessels, improving circulation and reducing blood pressure, which can help alleviate dizziness caused by reduced blood flow to the brain.

Antioxidant activity: The antioxidants in maypop capsules help protect cells from oxidative stress and damage, which can contribute to dizziness and vertigo by reducing inflammation and promoting healthy blood vessel function.
GABA-mimetic properties: Maypop has been shown to have a GABA-like effect on the brain, which can help regulate nervous system activity and reduce anxiety-related dizziness and lightheadedness.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the Maypop plant contain a high concentration of calming compounds, making them an effective ingredient in reducing symptoms of dizziness.
Rhyzomes: As a modified underground stem, the rhyzome of the Maypop plant is rich in anti-inflammatory properties that help to stabilize blood pressure and alleviate feelings of dizziness.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh maypop passionflower flowers and leaves, carefully drying them for two weeks in a warm oven set at 150 degrees fahrenheit.
Crush the dried herbs into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle or spice grinder, then sift through a fine-mesh strainer to remove any lumps.
Combine one part powdered maypop with one part arrowroot powder, mixing thoroughly by hand for two minutes to ensure even distribution.
Fill empty #0 gelatin capsules with the herb mixture, using a small funnel and capsule filler to avoid spills and mess.
Store the finished herbal maypop capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to six months, or refrigerate for longer storage.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Asiatic pennywort capsules helps with dizziness because they contain a unique blend of natural herbs that work together to calm the nervous system and improve blood circulation. The capsule's active compounds, including acylated stachydrine and hernandulcin, have been shown to increase GABA levels in the brain, which can help reduce feelings of lightheadedness and dizziness. Additionally, the capsules may help to relax the muscles and alleviate any underlying anxiety or stress that may be contributing to the dizziness.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Asiatic Pennywort's antioxidants help protect the body from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to dizziness.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The anti-inflammatory compounds in Asiatic Pennywort capsules may help reduce inflammation in the inner ear or other affected areas, which can alleviate symptoms of dizziness.

Vasodilatory properties: Asiatic Pennywort's ability to dilate blood vessels may help improve blood flow and oxygenation to the brain and inner ear, reducing feelings of dizziness and lightheadedness.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in bioactive compounds, roots help to calm the nerves and alleviate symptoms of dizziness.
Rhyzomes: Known for their anti-inflammatory properties, rhyzomes reduce swelling and ease pressure on the inner ear, which can contribute to dizziness.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 200 grams of fresh centella asiatica leaves from a trusted source and clean them thoroughly under running water.
Dry the leaves using a food dehydrator or oven at 60°c for 6 hours to preserve their potency.
Crush the dried leaves into a fine powder using a grinder or mortar and pestle, taking care not to generate heat that may destroy the herbs' properties.
Mix 30 grams of the crushed centella asiatica powder with 70 grams of gelatin and 10 grams of glycerin in a bowl, blending well to ensure uniformity.
Fill empty capsules with the herbal mixture and store them in an airtight container for up to one year, allowing them to harden for at least 24 hours before use.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Lemon balm capsules helps with dizziness because they contain a natural antihistamine that calms the nervous system, reducing symptoms of lightheadedness and vertigo. The herb's soothing properties help to stabilize blood pressure and improve circulation, which can become disrupted when experiencing dizziness. Additionally, lemon balm's calming effects on the digestive system can also alleviate nausea and stomach upset often associated with dizziness. As a result, taking herbal lemon balm capsules can provide quick and effective relief from dizzy spells.
remedy_properties: Calming effects: Lemon balm's calming properties can help alleviate symptoms of dizziness, including feelings of anxiety and stress, which can exacerbate dizziness episodes.

Antispasmodic properties: Lemon balm's ability to relax muscles and relieve spasms can help reduce the frequency and severity of dizzy spells, particularly those caused by muscle tension or inflammation.

Vasoactive compounds: The vasodilating effects of lemon balm's bioactive compounds can help improve blood flow and circulation, which can reduce feelings of lightheadedness and dizziness caused by poor circulation or orthostatic hypotension.
remedy_parts: Roots: Contain bioactive compounds that have been shown to calm the nervous system, reducing symptoms of dizziness.
Leaves: Rich in essential oils and flavonoids that can help alleviate digestive issues, a common contributor to dizziness.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality melissa officinalis leaves and flowers, selecting only fresh and fragrant material.
Dry the herb using air circulation or low-temperature drying methods to preserve its essential oils.
Grind dried lemon balm into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle, measuring 1 part herbal material to 1 part filler.
Fill empty capsules with the powdered herbal mixture, aiming for a total weight of 500-700 milligrams per capsule, and seal according to manufacturer's instructions.
Store the filled capsules in a cool, dark place for up to 12 months, ensuring proper labeling and shelf life tracking for future use.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Brahmi capsules helps with dizziness because they contain extracts of Bacopa monnieri, a herb known for its ability to improve cognitive function and memory. The capsules enhance the communication between brain cells, which in turn improves blood circulation and reduces feelings of lightheadedness and dizziness. Additionally, Brahmi has a calming effect on the nervous system, which helps to reduce anxiety and stress that can contribute to dizziness. remedy_properties: Cognitive Enhancing Properties: Brahmi capsules improve blood circulation to the brain, which helps to reduce feelings of lightheadedness and dizziness caused by poor oxygenation.

Anti-Anxiety and Sedative Properties: The herb's sedative properties can help alleviate anxiety-related dizziness by promoting relaxation and reducing stress levels, allowing for more stability and balance.

Antioxidant and Neuroprotective Properties: Brahmi capsules contain antioxidants that help protect the brain from damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to dizziness and lightheadedness, and also have neuroprotective effects that promote healthy brain function.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, brahmi roots are known to calm the nervous system and relieve symptoms of dizziness.
Rhyzomes: The underground stem of the brahmi plant is rich in bioactive compounds that help regulate blood pressure and circulation, reducing the frequency and intensity of dizziness.
remedy_recipe: Weigh accurately 400 grams of dried bacopa monnieri powder.
Mix 200 milliliters of distilled water with the bacopa monnieri powder in a clean glass bowl.
Heat the mixture under gentle stirring for 30 minutes at 80 degrees celsius to prepare an extract.
Fill 100 empty capsules with 250 milligrams each of the prepared extract and store them in an airtight container.
Label the containers with the date of preparation and contents and store them in a cool dark place.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ashwagandha capsules helps with dizziness because they contain the herb's potent adaptogenic properties, which help to calm and balance the body's nervous system. This, in turn, reduces feelings of lightheadedness and vertigo, allowing individuals to maintain a sense of stability and equilibrium. Additionally, ashwagandha has been shown to improve circulation and reduce inflammation, both of which can contribute to dizziness. remedy_properties: Adaptogenic property: Ashwagandha's adaptogenic nature helps to balance the body's response to stress, which can contribute to dizziness by reducing anxiety and promoting relaxation.
Anxiolytic property: The anxiolytic (anxiety-reducing) effects of Ashwagandha help to alleviate symptoms of dizziness caused by anxiety or stress-related conditions.
Antioxidant property: Ashwagandha's antioxidant properties help to protect the body from oxidative stress and inflammation, which can contribute to dizziness and vertigo.
remedy_parts: Roots: Ashwagandha roots are rich in bioactive compounds that help alleviate dizziness and vertigo by promoting balance and calmness.
Rhyzomes: The rhyzomes, or underground stems, of ashwagandha contain potent adaptogenic properties that help the body adapt to stress and anxiety-related dizziness.
remedy_recipe: Source high-quality withania somnifera roots or leaves from trusted suppliers.
Dry the harvested plant material in a warm air circulation dryer for 24 hours.
Grind the dried plant material into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix one part powdered ashwagandha with two parts filler material such as silica or potato starch to create the capsule mixture.
Fill gelatin capsules with the prepared mixture and store in an airtight container for up to six months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: American ginseng capsules helps with dizziness because they have a calming effect on the nervous system, which can help to stabilize blood pressure and reduce feelings of lightheadedness. The herb's ability to promote relaxation and reduce stress also contributes to its effectiveness in alleviating dizziness. Additionally, American ginseng has been shown to improve circulation and increase oxygen flow to the brain, further helping to combat dizziness and related symptoms.
remedy_properties: Adaptogenic properties: American Ginseng helps to adapt the body's response to stress and anxiety, which can contribute to dizziness by calming the nervous system and promoting balance.

Vasodilatory effects: The flavonoids present in American Ginseng help to dilate blood vessels, improving blood circulation and reducing the likelihood of lightheadedness or dizziness caused by poor blood flow to the brain.

Antioxidant activity: American Ginseng's antioxidant properties help to protect against oxidative stress and inflammation, which can contribute to dizziness and other symptoms related to conditions such as vertigo, Meniere's disease, or benign paroxysmal positional vertigo (BPPV).
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in bioactive compounds, American ginseng roots have been traditionally used to treat dizziness and other symptoms related to poor blood circulation.
Rhyzomes: The thick, underground stems (rhyzomes) of the American ginseng plant contain saponins, which help to calm the nervous system and alleviate dizziness.
remedy_recipe: Harvest dried and clean panax quinquefolius roots from a reliable source.
Grind the dried ginseng roots into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar.
Mix 500mg of the ginseng powder with 250mg of silica gel and 100mg of magnesium stearate in a small bowl.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the prepared mixture and seal them tightly.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to six months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Skullcap capsules helps with dizziness because they contain scutellaria lateriflora, a natural herb that has been used for centuries to calm the nervous system. The capsules work by reducing feelings of anxiety and stress, which can contribute to dizziness. By promoting relaxation and reducing muscle tension, skullcap capsules help to stabilize blood pressure and improve balance, leading to a reduction in symptoms of dizziness. remedy_properties: Scutellarein: This flavonoid has been shown to possess anti-anxiety and sedative effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of dizziness such as lightheadedness and vertigo.
Baicalein: This flavonoid has potent antioxidant properties, which can help protect the body from oxidative stress and inflammation that may contribute to dizziness and other symptoms.

Scutellin: This alkaloid has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which can help reduce muscle spasms and tension that may be contributing to dizziness and other balance disorders.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in bioactive compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to reduce symptoms of vertigo and dizziness.
Rhyzomes: Contains sesquiterpenes and other bioactive molecules that have anti-anxiety and sedative properties, making them effective for treating dizziness-related anxiety.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality scutellaria baicalensis roots in summer or fall for optimal potency.
Wash the harvested roots with clean water and dry them thoroughly to remove dirt and impurities.
Cut the dried roots into small pieces and grind them into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 10 minutes.
Mix the scutellaria baicalensis powder with 250mg of gelatin capsules according to the manufacturer's instructions taking 15 minutes.
Fill each capsule with the prepared herbal mixture and seal tightly within 30 minutes.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Siberian ginseng capsules helps with dizziness because they contain Eleutheroside, a compound that has been shown to improve blood circulation and reduce inflammation in the body. This increase in circulation can help to alleviate feelings of lightheadedness and dizziness by delivering oxygen and nutrients to the brain more efficiently. Additionally, Siberian ginseng's adaptogenic properties allow it to help the body adapt to stress and promote balance, which can also contribute to a reduction in dizziness.
remedy_properties: Adaptogenic Properties: Siberian Ginseng capsules help to adapt the body to stress and reduce the occurrence of dizziness by promoting balance in the body's physiological processes, including blood pressure regulation.
Cardiovascular Support: The capsules' ability to improve blood circulation and dilate blood vessels helps to increase oxygenation of the brain and reduce feelings of dizziness and lightheadedness.

Antioxidant Activity: Siberian Ginseng's high antioxidant content helps to protect the body from oxidative stress and inflammation, which can contribute to dizziness and other symptoms by reducing cell damage and promoting overall cardiovascular health.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots are rich in bioactive compounds that have been shown to help alleviate dizziness and improve overall circulation.
Rhyzomes: The rhyzomes contain high amounts of ginsenosides, which have been found to have a calming effect on the nervous system, helping to reduce symptoms of dizziness.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh or dried roots of eleutherococcus senticosus in the ratio 20:1.
Dry the roots further by spreading them out for 24 hours to reduce moisture content.
Grind the dried roots into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle for 30 minutes.
Mix the powdered root with 500 mg of silica gel and fill capsules made from gelatin or vegetarian alternative.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container in a cool dry place for up to one year.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Indian snakeroot capsules helps with dizziness because they contain a natural ingredient called Rauvolfia serpentina, which has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to calm the nervous system and reduce feelings of vertigo. The capsules work by soothing the digestive tract and stabilizing blood sugar levels, thereby alleviating symptoms of dizziness and lightheadedness. Additionally, Indian snakeroot's ability to relax muscle spasms can help to stabilize the body's balance and coordination, further reducing episodes of dizziness.
remedy_properties: Vasodilatory properties: Herbal Indian Snakeroot capsules help to dilate blood vessels, which can improve blood flow to the brain and alleviate dizziness caused by reduced blood circulation.

Antispasmodic properties: The capsules' antispasmodic effects help to relax smooth muscles in the body, including those that control blood pressure, heart rate, and digestion, which can reduce symptoms of dizziness such as lightheadedness and fainting.

Adaptogenic properties: Herbal Indian Snakeroot capsules have an adaptogenic effect on the body, helping it to adapt to stress and promoting balance in bodily functions, including those that regulate blood pressure, heart rate, and circulation, which can help alleviate dizziness caused by stress or anxiety.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of Indian Snakeroot contain compounds like berberine and palmatine, which have been shown to help alleviate symptoms of dizziness and vertigo by stabilizing blood pressure.

Rhyzomes: The rhyzomes ( underground stems) of Indian Snakeroot are rich in bioactive compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, making them effective in treating dizziness caused by inflammation or spasms.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality rauvolfia serpentina roots in the early morning for optimal potency and quality.
Dry the harvested roots using shade or low-temperature drying methods to preserve their active compounds.
Grind 20g of dried rauvolfia serpentina root into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for efficient extraction.
Mix the ground root powder with 500ml of boiling water to create an herbal decoction that steeps for 30 minutes.
Fill 100-200mg of the decoction mixture into vegetarian capsules and seal for convenient dosing.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Galangal capsules help with dizziness because they contain the essence of galangal root, a natural anti-inflammatory and antioxidant-rich herb. The active compounds in galangal, including gingerol and shogaol, work to calm the digestive system and alleviate nausea, which are common causes of dizziness. Additionally, galangal's antispasmodic properties help to relax the smooth muscles in the body, reducing spasms that can contribute to feelings of lightheadedness. By addressing these underlying factors, galangal capsules can provide natural relief from dizziness and associated symptoms.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Galangal's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as gingerols and shogaols, help reduce inflammation in the body, which can contribute to dizziness by relieving pressure on blood vessels and improving circulation.

Antioxidant properties: The antioxidant activity of galangal capsules helps protect the body from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, which can exacerbate dizziness symptoms such as lightheadedness and vertigo.

Digestive benefits: Galangal's carminative and anti-spasmodic properties help alleviate digestive issues like bloating, cramps, and gas, which can contribute to dizziness by reducing blood flow and increasing pressure on the body.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: Rich in bioactive compounds, rhyzomes have been traditionally used to treat digestive disorders and vertigo-related dizziness.
Roots: The roots of galangal contain essential oils and other bioactive constituents that help alleviate symptoms of dizziness by regulating the nervous system.
remedy_recipe: Dry the fresh alpinia galanga roots by spreading them on paper towels for two hours under shade conditions.
Grind dried alpinia galanga roots into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 30 minutes.
Mix one part powdered alpinia galanga with two parts silica filler in a glass bowl, stirring until well combined for five minutes.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the herbal mixture, using a capsule filling machine or manual filling tool for 10-15 minutes.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature away from direct sunlight and moisture for six months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ginger capsules helps with dizziness because they contain bioactive compounds like gingerols and shogaols, which have natural anti-inflammatory properties that can help to calm the stomach and reduce nausea. Additionally, ginger has been shown to stimulate digestion, which can alleviate feelings of lightheadedness and dizziness caused by poor circulation or digestive issues. By improving digestion and reducing inflammation, herbal ginger capsules can help to naturally alleviate symptoms of dizziness and promote overall wellness.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory compounds: Ginger's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as gingerol and shogaol, help to reduce inflammation in the body, which can contribute to feelings of dizziness and vertigo.

Digestive soothing properties: Herbal ginger capsules can help to soothe the digestive system and alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), motion sickness, and other conditions that may cause dizziness.
Vasodilatory effects: Ginger's vasodilatory properties help to dilate blood vessels, which can improve blood flow to the brain and reduce feelings of dizziness and lightheadedness.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: The thick, underground stem of the ginger plant has natural anti-inflammatory properties that help alleviate symptoms of dizziness by soothing digestive issues and reducing nausea.
Barks: The bark of the ginger plant contains compounds that have been shown to have a calming effect on the nervous system, helping to stabilize blood pressure and reduce episodes of dizziness.
remedy_recipe: Gather dried zingiber officinale roots and measure out 250 milligrams of powder for each capsule.
Weigh out 500 grams of gelatin and mix it with 1000 milliliters of distilled water to create a gelatin solution.
Combine the zingiber officinale powder with the gelatin solution in a large mixing bowl and stir well for 10 minutes.
Pour the mixture into empty capsules and let them dry at room temperature for 24 hours.
Store the finished capsules in an airtight container and consume 2-3 daily to help alleviate dizziness.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Anise capsules helps with dizziness because they contain natural oils that have a calming effect on the digestive system, which can help to alleviate symptoms of vertigo. The oil, also known as anise essential oil, has anti-inflammatory properties that may help to reduce inflammation in the inner ear, a common cause of dizziness. Additionally, anise capsules have been traditionally used to soothe nausea and improve digestion, which can further contribute to reducing feelings of dizziness and lightheadedness.
remedy_properties: Anethole: This compound has been shown to have anti-nausea and anti-emetic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of dizziness and vertigo by reducing vomiting and nausea.

Essential Oils: The essential oils present in anise seeds, such as anisic acid and anethole, have natural antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects that may help to relax the muscles and reduce feelings of dizziness and lightheadedness.

Furanoocumarins: These compounds have been found to have sedative and anti-anxiety properties, which can help to calm the nervous system and reduce symptoms of dizziness, such as feelings of panic or unease.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in essential oils and antioxidants, the roots are effective in calming digestive issues that may be contributing to dizziness.
Seeds: Containing a significant amount of apiol, a natural oil with anti-inflammatory properties, seeds help alleviate symptoms of vertigo and dizziness.
remedy_recipe: Weigh 200 grams of dried pimpinella anisum herb and grind it into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 5 minutes.
Mix the powdered herb with 100 grams of silica gel in a stainless steel bowl until well combined for 3 minutes.
Fill empty vegetarian capsules with approximately 250 milligrams of the herb-silica mixture, making sure not to overfill them for 2 minutes.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature away from direct sunlight for 30 days to allow stabilization and drying.
Once stabilized, transfer the capsules to a glass jar with a tight-fitting lid and store them in the refrigerator or freezer to prolong shelf life for up to 1 year.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Fennel capsules helps with dizziness because they contain a natural compound called anethole, which has been shown to have a profound effect on digestive health. By soothing the stomach and intestines, fennel capsules can help alleviate symptoms of nausea and vertigo that often accompany dizziness. Additionally, the capsules' calming properties may also help reduce stress and anxiety, which are common underlying causes of dizziness. remedy_properties: Carminative and anti-inflammatory effects: Fennel's carminative and anti-inflammatory properties help to relax digestive muscles, reduce inflammation in the digestive tract, and alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), which can contribute to dizziness.
Antioxidant activity: Fennel's antioxidant compounds help to neutralize free radicals that can damage blood vessels and lead to dizziness by improving circulation and reducing oxidative stress.

Gastric soothing and digestive regularity: Fennel's gastric soothing properties help to calm the stomach, reduce nausea, and promote regular digestion, which can help alleviate dizziness caused by digestive issues such as motion sickness or vertigo.
remedy_parts: Roots: Fennel roots contain a significant amount of flavonoids, which have been shown to be effective in reducing dizziness and improving circulation.
Seeds: Fennel seeds are rich in essential oils that help to soothe digestive issues, which can contribute to dizziness, and also have anti-inflammatory properties.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh foeniculum vulgare leaves and dry them using a food dehydrator or sun drying method for 7 hours.
Crush the dried foeniculum vulgare leaves into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 10 minutes.
Mix the powdered foeniculum vulgare with 1000mg of gelatin in a bowl for 5 minutes.
Fill empty capsules shells with the foeniculum vulgare-gelatin mixture, 250mg per capsule, using a capsule filling machine for 15 minutes.
Store the herbal foeniculum vulgare capsules in an airtight container at room temperature away from direct sunlight for 24 hours.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: English lavender capsules helps with dizziness because of its natural calming properties, which can help to alleviate feelings of vertigo and lightheadedness. The herb contains compounds that have a soothing effect on the nervous system, promoting relaxation and reducing anxiety, common triggers for dizziness. Additionally, lavender has been shown to improve circulation and reduce inflammation, both of which can contribute to feelings of dizziness. By addressing these underlying factors, English lavender capsules provide natural relief from dizziness and promote overall well-being.
remedy_properties: Anxiolytic (calming) effect: Lavender's calming properties can help reduce anxiety and stress, which are common triggers for dizziness, allowing the body to relax and stabilize.

Antihistaminic and anti-inflammatory effects: Lavender contains compounds that may help alleviate histamine-related symptoms, such as vertigo and lightheadedness, and reduce inflammation in the body, which can contribute to dizziness.
Vasoconstrictive properties: Lavender's ability to constrict blood vessels may help improve circulation and reduce feelings of lightheadedness or fainting, common symptoms of dizziness.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in bioactive compounds that have been shown to alleviate symptoms of vertigo and dizziness.
Seeds: Contain essential oils that help regulate blood flow and reduce anxiety, common underlying causes of dizziness.
remedy_recipe: Harvest dried lavandula angustifolia flowers from a reputable supplier or grow your own.
Weigh out 100g of dried lavandula angustifolia flowers and grind them into a fine powder.
Combine the powdered lavandula angustifolia with 200g of silica gel in a large bowl and mix well for 10 minutes.
Fill empty capsules with approximately 250mg of the herb mixture and seal immediately.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Lemon verbena capsules helps with dizziness because of its unique combination of calming properties. The herb contains a compound called citral, which has been shown to have a sedative effect on the nervous system, helping to reduce feelings of lightheadedness and dizziness. Additionally, lemon verbena's adaptogenic properties allow it to help regulate blood pressure and promote a sense of balance and calm, making it an effective natural remedy for individuals experiencing frequent episodes of dizziness.
remedy_properties: Antispasmodic property: Lemon verbena's antispasmodic properties help to relax smooth muscle contractions, which can alleviate symptoms of dizziness and lightheadedness caused by abnormal blood vessel spasms.
Anxiolytic property: The anxiolytic (anxiety-reducing) effects of lemon verbena capsules can help to calm the nervous system and reduce feelings of anxiety or panic that may contribute to dizziness.

Vasodilatory property: Lemon verbena's ability to dilate blood vessels can increase blood flow and oxygen delivery to the brain, which can help to alleviate dizziness and lightheadedness caused by poor circulation.
remedy_parts: Roots: Lemon verbena roots have a calming effect and are often used to treat anxiety, which can help alleviate symptoms of dizziness.
Buds: Lemon verbena buds contain compounds that help relax muscles and improve blood circulation, which may help reduce the feeling of dizziness.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh verbena officinalis leaves and flowers according to good harvesting practices and store in a cool dry place immediately after harvest.
Dry the verbena officinalis leaves and flowers using air circulation or oven drying at low temperature for 24 hours to preserve quality.
Grind the dried verbena officinalis into fine powder using mortar and pestle or coffee grinder for 5 minutes.
Mix 500 milligrams of ground verbena officinalis with 1000 milliliters of vodka in a clean glass jar and let it infuse for 2 weeks shaking daily.
Strain the infusion through cheesecloth into another container discarding solids and filling capsules with 250 milligrams of the liquid extract using a capsule machine.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Hawthorn capsules helps with dizziness because they contain flavonoids, oligomeric proanthocyanidins (OPCs), and other bioactive compounds that help to strengthen blood vessels and improve circulation. This increased blood flow can help to reduce symptoms of dizziness by increasing oxygenation of the brain and promoting a sense of balance and stability. Additionally, hawthorn's ability to dilate blood vessels can also help to reduce blood pressure, which is often a contributing factor to dizziness.
remedy_properties: Cardiac tonic effect: Hawthorn's flavonoids help to improve blood flow, reduce blood pressure, and strengthen heart contractions, which can alleviate dizziness caused by cardiovascular issues.

Vasodilatory effect: The bioactive compounds in hawthorn capsules relax blood vessels, widening them and improving circulation, which can help to increase oxygenation of the brain and alleviate dizziness and lightheadedness.

Anxiolytic and sedative effects: Hawthorn's flavonoids have been shown to possess anxiolytic and sedative properties, which can help to reduce anxiety and stress that may be contributing to dizziness, promoting a sense of calm and balance.
remedy_parts: Roots: Hawthorn roots have been traditionally used to treat various circulatory issues, including dizziness, due to their rich flavonoid and phenolic content.

Barks: The barks of the hawthorn plant contain flavonoids and oligomeric proanthocyanidins (OPCs), which may help alleviate dizziness symptoms by improving blood vessel function and reducing inflammation.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100g of dried crataegus monogyna leaves and flowers from a trusted supplier or grow your own.
Grind the 100g of dried herb into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle or spice grinder for 5 minutes.
Mix 500mg of the ground herb with 50mg of silica gel in a small bowl to improve flowability for 10 minutes.
Fill empty capsules with the 550mg mixture and seal tightly by hand or using an automated capsule filler within 15 minutes.
Store the herbal crataegus monogyna capsules in an airtight container in a cool, dark place for up to 6 months before use.

intro_desc: Herbal capsules for dizziness are natural supplements that combine various herbs, vitamins, and minerals to alleviate symptoms of vertigo, lightheadedness, and imbalance. These capsules work by improving blood circulation, reducing inflammation, and promoting relaxation. Examples of herbal capsules that help with dizziness include Ginkgo biloba, Ginger root, and Valerian root extracts. For instance, Ginkgo biloba improves oxygenation to the brain, while Ginger root soothes the digestive system and reduces nausea. By taking these herbal capsules regularly, individuals can regain their confidence in daily activities, such as walking or standing without feeling lightheaded, and enjoy improved overall well-being.
supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat dizziness with herbal capsules is to focus on natural remedies that address the underlying causes of vertigo. Ginkgo biloba capsules help improve blood flow to the brain, reducing dizziness and lightheadedness. Ginger root capsules also alleviate nausea and vomiting associated with vertigo. Additionally, peppermint oil capsules can help calm the digestive system and reduce symptoms. Always consult a healthcare professional before starting any new supplement regimen.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to dizziness that are treated with herbal capsules are nausea, vertigo, and lightheadedness. These conditions often result from poor digestion, hormonal imbalances, or inner ear problems. Herbal capsules containing ginger, peppermint, and licorice root may help alleviate symptoms by soothing the stomach, regulating blood pressure, and reducing inflammation. Additionally, Ginkgo biloba and passionflower are used to calm the nervous system and promote balance.
